opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has swelled up like a balloon since lunchtime, the pressure is immense, and I feel like I cannot draw a full breath.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The swelling came on fast this afternoon after lunch and keeps getting bigger — I'm scared it might be a blockage or a tumour, and the pressure is making it hard to breathe.

symptom_narrative.onset: the visible swelling started around lunchtime today and has grown through the afternoon; the milder fullness and trapped-wind feeling has come and gone for about 3 months
symptom_narrative.duration: the severe swelling has been building over roughly the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a tight, pressured, blown-up feeling with a lot of trapped wind; my belly looks and feels much bigger than normal
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pressure is immense and I can't do my trousers up; it feels frightening
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse after meals, especially after a big carb-heavy lunch; it usually settles overnight or once I pass wind
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: passing wind, and it tends to go down overnight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: eating, especially heavy or carb-rich meals
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel like I can't take a full deep breath because of the pressure, and I'm very anxious about it
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had milder versions of this on and off for about 3 months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still walk around but I can't wear my normal clothes and I'm sitting propped up to breathe more comfortably

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter anti-wind capsules (simethicone) taken several times today

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I've been snacking a lot on sugar-free 'diet' snacks and chewing sugar-free gum; my diet's been carb-heavy lately
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: work has been really stressful recently

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to be reassured it is not cancer or a surgical emergency

communication_style.typical_message_style: anxious, focused on the fear of a serious underlying cause

objective_data_offered.value: abdomen looks markedly swollen and rounded; patient has undone her trousers and is sitting propped up; she is talking in full sentences and does not look blue or in respiratory distress
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual impression over a video/photo only; cannot assess whether the swelling is gas, fluid or a mass
single reading on an uncalibrated home device

objective_data_offered.value: about 95 beats per minute on my smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: wearable estimate; patient is anxious which can raise heart rate
single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff

objective_data_offered.value: several empty wrappers of sugar-free / artificial-sweetener diet snacks on the desk
